case_title: LPF YERBA BUENA, INC. VS. JOHN ENGELHART ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LPF YERBA BUENA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENGELHART, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 788 HARRISON STREET #624, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LPF YERBA BUENA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ENGELHART, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LPF YERBA BUENA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ENGELHART, JOHN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LPF YERBA BUENA, INC. SERVED JUL-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENGELHART, JOHN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ENGELHART, JOHN
